headline: Visa Expands Travel And Cross Border Payment Uses As Shares Screen Undervalued
summary: Visa (NYSE:V) and Trip.com Group launched a global virtual travel card program aimed at improving online and in destination travel payments. The program is designed to support smoother transactions between travelers and travel partners as international travel activity continues to recover. Separately, Citcon expanded Visa Direct’s cross border money movement capabilities for more than 3,000 merchants. The Citcon integration supports faster push payments for payouts and refunds to cards, bank...
